titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Yale University Library Photographs and Memorabilia of Collections and Events
Yale University Library Photographs and Memorabilia of Collections and Events
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday September 3, 2020 at 10:04

did.unittitle: Yale University Library photographs and memorabilia of collections and events
did.abstract: The collection consists of photographic negatives of new acquisitions, specifically acquisitions for the Rare Book Room (now the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library). Also included are photographs of exhibits, library staff at work, various library operations and departments, and bookplates, as well as a commemorative edition of the Yale Daily News featuring the opening of Sterling Memorial Library..

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 32-A (YRG 32-A), Central records of the Yale University Library and records of the librarian.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Yale University Library Photographs and Memorabilia of Collections and Events (RU 387). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by library department and by medium and in subsequent accessions.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection consists of photographic negatives of new acquisitions, specifically acquisitions for the Rare Book Room (now the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library). Also included are photographs of exhibits, library staff at work, various library operations and departments, and bookplates, as well as a commemorative edition of the Yale Daily News featuring the opening of Sterling Memorial Library.

did.unittitle: Photographs and memorabilia of Yale University Library collections and events
Rare Book Room (Manuscripts and Archives and Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library)
Getting a scholarship and a job
Moving the collection to Sterling Library
Photographs from the film Making a Library
Artistic rendition of Sterling Memorial Library entering the digital world
Yale Daily News commemorative edition featuring opening of Sterling Memorial Library
Yale Daily News commemorative edition featuring opening of Sterling Memorial Library

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.
